summary: Recording source unknown but features what may be the best ever performance of Hell In A Bucket
review: The sole reviewer rates this tape five stars, calling it possibly the best rendition of "Hell In A Bucket" they've heard. No details are given about the audio source or sound quality, so the technical side remains uncertain while the musical highlight shines brightly.
